title: Simplicity
body: It is clear that the success of many things lies in simplicity, this happened with Google and now it is happening with [Twitter](http://www.xarop.com/tag/twitter/). They are services that give us exclusively what we want, of course, success also lies in the fact that we can expand or modify these services according to our needs and that they offer you tools to do it in a simple way, a good example of this modularity is Firefox. Although there is something for everything, according to my personal taste, I cannot explain the success of other social networks such as Facebook or MySpace, if it is not for the use of good marketing strategies. Twitter has expanded like wildfire solely because of its usability and the good experience and satisfaction of its users.
